title: VMD FOI requests received 1 January to 31 March 2025
body: "The VMD received the following FOI requests in the first three months of 2025.  Of the requests:   1 request related to our Information and Communications Technology (ICT) arrangements 8 requests for information relating to Business Support 1 request for information relating to Finance 7 sought information about Authorisations 13 were requests for information about Pharmacovigilance 1 request for information relating to Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) 2 requests for information relating to Legislation 1 request for information relating to the Principle Veterinary Advisor (PVA) 4 sought information about Enforcement 2 requests for information relating to Inspections   If you would like to see any of these requests and our replies, please email postmaster@vmd.gov.uk "
